name: Cypress E2E Tests

on:
  workflow_dispatch:
  push:
    branches:
      - testCypress

concurrency:
  group: cypress-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  e2e:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    services:
      mysql:
        image: mysql:8
        env:
          MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: toor
        ports:
          - 3306:3306
        options: >-
          --health-cmd="mysqladmin ping"
          --health-interval=10s
          --health-timeout=5s
          --health-retries=5

    steps:
      - name: Checkout frontend
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          path: frontend

      - name: Checkout backend
        uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          repository: villno55/BACKEND-MONITO
          token: ${{ secrets.BACKEND_REPO_TOKEN }}
          ref: main
          path: backend

      - name: Configurar Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20

      - name: Cargar base de datos
        run: mysql -h 127.0.0.1 -uroot -ptoor < backend/basededatos.sql

      - name: Instalar dependencias del backend
        run: |
          cd backend
          npm install

      - name: Iniciar backend
        run: |
          cd backend
          npm start &
        env:
          DB_HOST: 127.0.0.1
          DB_PORT: 3306
          DB_NAME: sigma_mvp
          DB_USER: root
          DB_PASSWORD: toor
          JWT_SECRET: test_secret
          PORT: 3000

      - name: Instalar dependencias del frontend
        run: |
          cd frontend
          npm install

      - name: Iniciar frontend
        run: |
          cd frontend
          npm run dev &
        env:
          VITE_API_URL: http://localhost:3000

      - name: Esperar a que backend y frontend estén disponibles
        run: npx wait-on http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:5173 --timeout 60000

      - name: Ejecutar pruebas EP01 - EP04
        run: |
          cd frontend
          npx cypress run \
            --record \
            --key ${{ secrets.CYPRESS_RECORD_KEY }} \
            --spec "cypress/e2e/EP01_usuarios.cy.js,cypress/e2e/EP02_grupos.cy.js,cypress/e2e/EP03_observaciones.cy.js,cypress/e2e/EP04_alertas.cy.js"
